reviews.comment:
Muy bien la atención. WiFi libre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Free WiFi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdzluV0t3EAE

reviews.comment:
Bien atendidos. Depende la hora y la temporada a veces  hay que esperar un poco ya que es una de las estaciones de servicio que ae encuentra  antes o al finalizar la ruta del desierto dependiendo del viaje. Recomendable lllenar el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Depending on the time of day and season, there might be a slight wait, as it's one of the gas stations located either before or at the end of the desert route, depending on your trip. Filling up is recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX1o3WkhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Pasé fuera de los horarios picos, así que nos atendieron rápido y muy atento el playero. Los baños estaban limpios. Aceptan todos los medios de pago.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. I stopped by during off-peak hours, so we were served quickly and the beach attendant was very attentive. The bathrooms were clean. They accept all payment methods.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación esperamos una pronta visita

reviews.comment:
la actitud de los playeros es pesima, muy mala voluntad para atender y no es cosa de un día siempre que pasamos es lo mismo.

(Translated by Google)
The attitude of the beach attendants is terrible, they are very unwilling to help and it's not just a one-off thing, it's the same every time we go there.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A great place to refuel and take a break; good service and clean restrooms.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
Mala atención deí personal despachante de combustible de playa, en particular del que me atendió a mi, entiendo puede haber estado cansado o de mal humor por la cantidad de gente que había para cargar pero no justifica la mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from the beach fuel station attendant, particularly the one who served me. I understand he may have been tired or in a bad mood due to the number of people waiting to fill up, but that doesn't justify the poor service.
